title: alopecurus textilis subsp. tiflisiensis
intro: Alopecurus textilis subsp. tiflisiensis, also known as Chinese millettia grass or Tiflis foxtail, is a type of grass native to Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Alopecurus textilis subsp. tiflisiensis include reducing fever, alleviating rheumatism, and supporting digestive health, among others. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it is also used in modern herbal supplements and teas.
